items.name: Sales Performance
items.description: Daily transactional sales data by store, product, region, and date. Covers FY2024–FY2026.

items.name: Budget vs Actual
items.description: Monthly plan versus actual revenue, margin, and expense targets by business unit and region.

items.name: Store Operations
items.description: Store labor, foot traffic, staffing compliance, and fulfillment metrics by location and week.

items.name: Marketing Performance
items.description: Campaign spend, impressions, clicks, and attributed conversions across paid and owned channels.
